in_progress_tasks.name: Author Vigil Capture Shortcut in Shortcuts.app
in_progress_tasks.progress: Shortcut built on Mac. Share-sheet registration works (via Safari > Share > Shortcuts > Vigil Capture). Auth header bug fixed. Currently stuck debugging: server returns 'content is required and must be non-empty' even when user types a note via share-sheet invocation. Pre-POST debug alert was requested but user paused before adding it.

remaining_tasks.name: Export .shortcut file + copy iCloud share link

blockers.description: Server sees empty content field on POST. Either the content variable is wrong before the POST, or the Get Contents of URL JSON body's content field is pointing at a different (empty) variable.
blockers.workaround: Add Show Alert showing content magic variable right before Get Contents of URL. Screenshot reveals whether content is empty (variable bug) or populated (JSON-body bug).

human_actions_pending.action: Add a Show Alert debug action between Set Variable content and Get Contents of URL. Message = content magic variable chip. Run via Safari share sheet with a note. Screenshot the alert.
human_actions_pending.context: Diagnoses whether content variable is populated correctly.

decisions.decision: Pivoted URL-vs-text branch from 'Shortcut Input is URL' to 'Count of URLs from Input > 0'
decisions.rationale: macOS Shortcuts does not expose type comparison for Shortcut Input magic variable; only has value / does not have value. Get URLs from Input normalizes regardless of input source.
User initially typed PWA URL. Fixed to API host.

decisions.decision: Response-handling If uses Dictionary Value (key=id) has any value
decisions.rationale: macOS Shortcuts may not expose Status Code on this version. id presence in parsed dictionary is a reliable success proxy.

next_action: Add Show Alert debug action between Set Variable content and Get Contents of URL to capture exact content value the shortcut is sending. Run via Safari share > Shortcuts > Vigil Capture with a note. Screenshot the alert. If content is empty: URL-branch Text action is wired wrong. If content is populated: JSON body's content field is pointing at a different (empty) variable.
context_notes: Interactive execution of phase 85 plan 01 task 1. This is a human-driven Shortcuts.app authoring task, not code. Progress is real (shortcut exists, compiles, runs, talks to real API server, gets real HTTP responses) but the 'content required' error is the last bug blocking task completion. Once past this, task 2 is easy (blank key, export .shortcut, iCloud link, paste file path back).
